Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 210 

MH_SUD_PAHP_MOS 

LABEL: Mental Health and Substance Use Disorder Prepaid Ambulatory Health Plan (PAHP) Months 

DESCRIPTION: Number of months the beneficiary was enrolled in a mental health (MH) and Substance Use Disorder 
(SUD) Prepaid Ambulatory Health Plan (PAHP) Managed Care Plan in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: MH_SUD_PAHP_MOS 

LONG NAME:
